changes: Off-the-rack combat ships now come with sensible default fits: weapons share a single reach band (so every gun can fire at the range you're at), bare hulls have weapons/armor, and drone carriers ship with drone bays.
Empire flagships now carry their signature weapons — Crimson capitals mount the Fury Cannon (now a long-range reach-5 siege gun that hits harder as your hull drops).
Crimson combat hulls now tank through hull and armor instead of shields, matching their brawler identity (overall durability is about the same).

`refit_ship` is now offered whenever a ship class's standard-issue loadout changes, not only on stat rebalances. Dock at a shipyard and refit to pick up the new default fit and stats for free — your old modules and cargo are moved to station storage, so you can refit and then re-fit your own setup if you prefer it.
